entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Dry regions in Asia characterized by limiting natural resources and environmental degradation

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Environmental assets that are over-exploited in dry regions of Asia

entities.name: ERRATIC RAINFALL
entities.description: Unpredictable precipitation patterns characterizing dry regions in Asia

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: Decline in land quality and productivity in dry regions of Asia

entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: The wearing away of topsoil in dry regions of Asia

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: Economic hardship affecting rural populations in dry regions of Asia

entities.name: BURGEONING POPULATION
entities.description: Rapidly growing population increasing demand for food and fuel in Asia

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL DEGRADATION
entities.description: The deterioration of the environment resulting from over-exploitation of natural resources

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: The financial gain of rural poor in dry regions of Asia

entities.name: INTEGRATED FARMER PARTICIPATORY WATERSHED MANAGEMENT MODEL
entities.description: A holistic approach developed by ICRISAT and NARS to manage natural resources sustainably

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Center for Semi-Arid Tropics, an organization developing watershed management models

entities.name: NARS
entities.description: National Agricultural Research Systems, partners in developing watershed management models

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER RESOURCE MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Environment-friendly practices developed to enhance productivity in semi-arid tropics

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION PRACTICES
entities.description: Improved practices for preserving soil and water to increase productivity

entities.name: NUTRIENT MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Practices for optimizing nutrient use to increase agricultural productivity

entities.name: PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Practices for controlling pests to increase agricultural productivity

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Ecoregions in Asia characterized by intermediate rainfall

entities.name: WATER-HOLDING CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to retain water, specifically medium and high capacity soils in Asia
